# FlipPress Blog
## About
A niche blog about technology. Operated by FlipPress (FlipFactory).
Content is AI-assisted with human editorial oversight.

## Topics
- Technology
- AI

## Editorial Process
AI-assisted research and drafting with quality checks and human review.
Learn more: /editorial-process

## Contact
Publisher: FlipFactory (https://flipfactory.it.com)
